name: JL 杰理 / AC79 / WL82
description: JieLi Tech AC79/WL82/AC791N series, WiFi+BLE dual-core RISC-V, audio_server architecture
common_pitfalls: audio_server enc/dec events must decode before playback, open mic after AUDIO_SERVER_EVENT_END
thread_fork / thread_kill thread management API (non-standard FreeRTOS), note stack units
Stack units need to check thread_fork docs (some APIs use bytes, some use words)
SDK module trimming must first scan module map (C6.2), annotate SDK tag/version
AC79 screen products must watch LCD DMA vs audio DMA contention (same bus bandwidth)
WL82 single-core has no cross-core issues, but more constrained resources (Flash/RAM less than AC79)
JL SDK cJSON is a custom version, cJSON_Parse behavior may differ from upstream
When audio_server playback and capture share the same instance, strict serialization is required
SDK WiFi driver has internal mutex, no WiFi API calls allowed in ISR
LVGL refresh task recommended on same core as audio task (avoid cross-core queue delay)
Camera/LCD/audio DMA buffers must verify SDK memory domain, cache maintenance, and zero-copy release timing

wss_tls.note: JL 平台 TLS 握手适中

lvgl.note: Screen products with large UI require 8192

media_dma_buffer.note: audio/video DMA frame pool + owner generation

main.note: main task needs to initialize audio_server

key_sdk_config.MALLOC_MEM_SIZE: Adjust according to product Flash size

build_commands.build: make ac791n_demo_wifi（Specific target depends on SDK version）
build_commands.flash: JLink 或 JL USB 工具
build_commands.crash_decode: Check PC/LR register values in SDK crash dump
